summary: Do not submit in the current state. First align the claim set to the evidence that actually exists, then add the minimum missing artifacts that turn the diagnostic framing from a plausible story into a defensible paper.

action_items.title: Produce `benefit_bucket_audit.json` and realign the mechanism claims
action_items.description: Compute per-sample harmed, fixed, and no-effect buckets for the main methods on GSM8K and, where possible, for the transfer/boundary settings. Rewrite the abstract, contributions, and observer/controller language so they rest on this artifact.

action_items.title: Add a minimal seed-sensitivity spot-check for the headline comparisons
action_items.description: Run at least three seeds on the core GSM8K comparison and the MATH500 transfer comparison, then report mean/std and paired significance or bootstrap intervals for the main deltas.

action_items.title: Resolve the honest-compute fairness ambiguity
action_items.description: Make an explicit choice: either compare realized pipelines and say so, or rerun the fairness-sensitive methods under more nearly matched batch/compile settings. If `CORE-proxy` must remain `batch_size=1`, record the blocker and downgrade any fairness-sensitive language.

action_items.title: Repair the signal audit so it answers the proposal’s actual H3
action_items.description: Measure revision-benefit prediction directly, define control effectiveness with one consistent baseline rule, and avoid claiming calibration-controller mismatch unless a calibration-based intervention is actually instantiated or explicitly declared observational-only.

action_items.title: Clean asset lineage and declare canonical sources
action_items.description: Add one manifest that maps every paper claim to one authoritative JSON asset, supersede stale artifacts, and synchronize `writing/paper.md` with the actual evidence pack.

action_items.title: Narrow the task-dependence language until uncertainty is available
action_items.description: Present MATH500 as boundary evidence and HumanEval as structural stress-test evidence. Remove any phrasing that implies a robust regime map unless the new uncertainty and bucket artifacts support it.

action_items.title: Separate entropy and TIGER in the code boundary section
action_items.description: Do not use a merged `Entropy/TIGER Ungated Revision` row unless their code behavior is empirically indistinguishable and the merge is explicitly justified.
